zh.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands於大約1270年出生在昌爾 易曼德斯。她至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1311年享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands于大约1270年出生在昌爾 易曼德斯。她至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1311年享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Channel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Channell
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near an estuary, channel, or drain, Middle English chan(n)el, kanel, Anglo-Norman French c(h)anel (from Latin canalis ‘canal, conduit’).

variants.name: Channels
meanings: Altered form of English   Channel  . It is found mainly in OH.

nameMeanings.name: Islands
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of the four farmsteads so named. The origin of their name is not certain; it may be a compound of is ‘ice’ + land ‘(piece of) land, farmstead’ or from Island ‘Iceland’ (the name of the country).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands was born about 1270, in Channel Islands. She had at least 1 daughter. She died about 1311, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands est née environ 1270, à Îles Anglo-Normandes. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1311, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands wurde um 1270 in Channel Islands geboren. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1311 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands è nata il circa 1270 nel Channel Islands. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1311, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Channel Islands: チャネル イスランズ
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islandsは約1270年にチャネル イスランズで生まれた。彼女は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1311年に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands(은)는 대략 1270년 챈 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1311년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Channel Islands. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1311, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Joan Of The Channel Islands родилась около 1270 г. в местности чаннель исландс. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1311 г. в возрасте 43 лет.
